No other Appearance. The Tentative Ruling is adopted.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTS NEIL SIMON and UNITED STATES JUDO FEDERATION'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is Sustained with ten days leave to amend. No opposition filed. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Harold Kahn; Not reported. =302/HK
